title: Disable unzip-and-route auto-trigger — switch to workflow_dispatch
q_summary: Actions keep failing. Step back — is the zip workflow even needed for our current flow?
a_summary: Diagnosed that unzip-and-route.yml is designed for zip-bundle delivery by external agents, not for our push_files flow. The workflow kept triggering (and failing) because every edit to the workflow file itself causes GitHub Actions to re-run it once regardless of path filters. Decided to disable auto-trigger by switching from push/paths to workflow_dispatch only. The Perplexity→GitHub flow uses push_files directly and does not need the router. Zip pipeline preserved for future use when external agents need it.
decisions: Switched trigger from push/paths to workflow_dispatch only
Added explanatory comment in workflow header
Preserved full workflow body for future zip-bundle use case
